title: deltaclip~

messages.description: any signal whose changes will be clipped
input signal with its change limited by the delta minimum and maximum values

body: [deltaclip~] limits the change between samples in an incoming signal. This is also known as 'slew limiting'. It has a negative maximum delta for when the signal decays and a positive maximum delta for when it rises. When they're both 0, the signal doesn't shift. Below we divide by the sample rate to get the max amplitude shift per second instead of per sample.
